ddls:
CREATE TABLE "protein_domains" (
  "domain_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each protein domain */,
  "sequence_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the protein sequence the domain belongs to */,
  "domain_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of domain */,
  "start_position" INTEGER /* Start position of the domain within the sequence */,
  "end_position" INTEGER /* End position of the domain within the sequence */,
  "e_value" REAL /* E-value associated with the domain (if applicable) */,
  "annotation_date" TEXT /* Date the domain was annotated */,
  "annotated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who annotated the domain */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the domain annotation */,
  "domain_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the domain */,
  "public_domain" INTEGER /* Indicates if the domain is publicly accessible */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the version of the sequence where the domain was identified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("domain_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_protein_domains_annotated_by FOREIGN KEY ("annotated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_protein_domains_domain_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("domain_type_id") REFERENCES domain_types ("domain_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_protein_domains_sequence_id FOREIGN KEY ("sequence_id") REFERENCES sequences ("sequence_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_protein_domains_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES sequence_versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sequences" (
  "sequence_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each protein sequence */,
  "sequence_name" TEXT /* Name of the protein sequence */,
  "sequence_length" INTEGER /* Length of the protein sequence */,
  "sequence_data" TEXT /* The actual sequence data */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the sequence was uploaded */,
  "uploaded_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the sequence */,
  "species" TEXT /* Species the protein sequence is from */,
  "organism" TEXT /* Organism the protein sequence is from */,
  "taxonomic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the taxonomic classification of the organism */,
  "accession_number" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the sequence in public databases */,
  "source_database" TEXT /* The database where the sequence was obtained from */,
  "publication_id" TEXT /* Reference to the publication where the sequence was first described */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sequence_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "domain_types" (
  "domain_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each domain type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the domain type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the domain type */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the domain type is active */,
  "parent_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent domain type for hierarchical organization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("domain_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_domain_types_parent_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_type_id") REFERENCES domain_types ("domain_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution the user is affiliated with */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user is part of */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date the user last logged in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "annotations" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation */,
  "domain_id" INTEGER /* ID of the domain being annotated */,
  "annotation_text" TEXT /* Text of the annotation */,
  "annotation_date" TEXT /* Date the annotation was made */,
  "annotated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the annotation */,
  "annotation_type" TEXT /* Type of annotation (e.g., functional, structural) */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Indicates if the annotation is publicly accessible */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the annotation */,
  "review_status" TEXT /* Status of the annotation review (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_annotated_by FOREIGN KEY ("annotated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_domain_id FOREIGN KEY ("domain_id") REFERENCES protein_domains ("domain_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "domain_id" INTEGER /* ID of the domain being commented on */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  "commented_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Indicates if the comment is publicly accessible */,
  "is_flagged" INTEGER /* Indicates if the comment has been flagged for review */,
  "parent_comment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent comment for threaded discussions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_commented_by FOREIGN KEY ("commented_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_parent_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_comment_id") REFERENCES comments ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_domain_id FOREIGN KEY ("domain_id") REFERENCES protein_domains ("domain_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sequence_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "sequence_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sequence the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "version_data" TEXT /* The actual sequence data for this version */,
  "versioned_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in this version */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if this version is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sequence_versions_sequence_id FOREIGN KEY ("sequence_id") REFERENCES sequences ("sequence_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sequence_versions_versioned_by FOREIGN KEY ("versioned_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
